name: literary_devices
description: Extract literary devices from the text: metaphors, similes, personification, and allusions. Identify the type of device. Use the exact text from the source — do not paraphrase.

examples.text: The wind whispered through the trees like a lullaby. Her eyes were diamonds, sparkling in the dim light. It was a scene worthy of Eden itself.

extractions.text: The wind whispered through the trees
